SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-25-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:16am
Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedeikin, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Catherine White & Rena Spiteri appear as respondents in pro per. Vincent Patterson appears as appellant in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
